changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_data_template; CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_data_template AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_template_id, dt.id AS template_id, dt.uid AS template_uid, dt.version_uid AS template_version_uid, dt.version_number AS template_version_no, dt.code AS template_code, dt.name AS template_name, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(dt.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), dt.name)) AS template_name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(dt.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), dt.name)) AS template_name_ar, dt.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(dt.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(dt.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.data_template dt;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_data_template;

changeSet.author: hamza

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_data_template_uid_uniq;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_data_template_slm_uid;
